title: Import Caddyfile
subtitle: Convert a Caddyfile to JSON and apply it as the running configuration.

warning.title: Full Configuration Replacement
warning.description: Importing a Caddyfile will replace the entire running configuration. All existing servers, routes, and TLS settings will be overwritten.

caddyfile.title: Caddyfile
caddyfile.description: Paste your Caddyfile content or upload a file.

jsonPreview.title: JSON Preview
jsonPreview.description: This is the resulting configuration that will be applied.

confirmDialog.title: Replace Entire Configuration?
confirmDialog.description: This will overwrite the entire running Caddy configuration with the converted Caddyfile. All existing servers, routes, and TLS policies will be replaced. This action cannot be undone.
